task_completion.description: Open the correct PEBL script in a text editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (GUI like VS Code/gedit or terminal like nano/vim) is open showing the file 'gng_task.pbl'. The file path should indicate it is in '~/pebl/experiments/fmri_gng/'.

task_completion.description: Update the stimulus and inter-stimulus durations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The script shows 'gStimDur' assigned to 500 and 'gISIDur' assigned to 2500.
The script shows 'gGoKey' assigned to the string value "1".

task_completion.description: Configure the visual settings for dark mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The script shows 'gBGColor' assigned to "black", the 'MakeWindow' function call using "black" as its background parameter, and 'gFGColor' assigned to "white".

task_completion.description: Update the output log file name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The script shows 'gOutFile' assigned to the string "gng_fmri_log.csv".
The text editor shows no 'unsaved changes' indicator (e.g., no dot on the tab in VS Code, or a 'saved' message in nano/vim), or a terminal command is visible confirming the file was written/saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is editing the correct file path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The editor title bar, tab, or terminal command explicitly shows the path '/home/ga/pebl/experiments/fmri_gng/gng_task.pbl'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent maintained valid script syntax.
integrity.visual_evidence: The variable assignments use proper syntax (e.g., keeping the original assignment operators like '<-' or '=' intact) rather than just pasting the raw text from the prompt.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely edited the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an actual text editor interface or valid terminal stream editing commands (like sed), rather than just echoing the final answers into a new blank file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target script is located at /home/ga/pebl/experiments/fmri_gng/gng_task.pbl. The expected modifications are: gStimDur = 500, gISIDur = 2500, gGoKey = "1", gBGColor = "black", MakeWindow initialized with "black", gFGColor = "white", and gOutFile = "gng_fmri_log.csv".
